name: raycast-insta360-link-preset-switcher
title: Insta360 Link Preset Switcher
description: Switch Insta360 Link scene presets (pan/tilt/zoom framing) from Raycast.
author: productgabi

commands.name: switch-preset
commands.title: Switch Webcam Preset
commands.subtitle: Insta360 Link
commands.description: Pick a saved framing and move the camera to it. Also capture, edit, and delete presets.

commands.name: apply-slot-1
commands.title: Apply Webcam Preset 1
commands.subtitle: Slot 1
commands.description: Apply the 1st saved preset. Assign a global hotkey to this command.

commands.name: apply-slot-2
commands.title: Apply Webcam Preset 2
commands.subtitle: Slot 2
commands.description: Apply the 2nd saved preset. Assign a global hotkey to this command.

commands.name: apply-slot-3
commands.title: Apply Webcam Preset 3
commands.subtitle: Slot 3
commands.description: Apply the 3rd saved preset. Assign a global hotkey to this command.

commands.name: apply-slot-4
commands.title: Apply Webcam Preset 4
commands.subtitle: Slot 4
commands.description: Apply the 4th saved preset. Assign a global hotkey to this command.

commands.name: apply-slot-5
commands.title: Apply Webcam Preset 5
commands.subtitle: Slot 5
commands.description: Apply the 5th saved preset. Assign a global hotkey to this command.

preferences.name: uvcUtilPath
preferences.title: uvc-util Path
preferences.description: Absolute path to the uvc-util binary (Raycast does not inherit your shell PATH).

preferences.name: cameraName
preferences.title: Camera Name
preferences.description: The UVC device name to control, as shown by `uvc-util -d`.
